title: DeepSeek V4 Analysis..
summary: Caleb Writes Code analyzes DeepSeek V4, highlighting its major reduction in inference compute and cost relative to prior models. The video frames V4 as a pivotal development in the open versus closed AI lab competition, driven by differing national incentives for model efficiency and intelligence scaling.
